notes.summary: Pre-existing ST-9 defect: getDocDiff 400-response behavioral test fails because extractErrorMessage returns the API error message instead of the friendly 'too large to compare' fallback. Genuine code defect (not an env artifact), introduced in ST-9, present on ms5 base. Outside ST-10 scope. Surfaced for Coordinator awareness.

test_sufficiency: Sufficient — 22 tests cover the Documents link, label, description content, section count, and all pre-existing structural contracts. Coverage matches the additive scope.
documentation_accuracy: Accurate — docs/features/web-shell.md and docs/guides/content-management.md correctly reflect five admin sections, with the Documents entry matching the implementation href, label, and description.
security_finding: None — no security surface change; admin gate and API enforcement unchanged.
